verses.text: The angel foretells three more kings in Persia, and a fourth richer who will stir all against Greece. History written beforehand. God knows the rise of kings ages before they come.
The angel foretells three more kings in Persia, and a fourth richer who will stir all against Greece. History written beforehand. God knows the rise of kings ages before they come.
A mighty king shall rule with great dominion, but his kingdom be broken and divided to the four winds, not to his heirs. Greatness scattered. The empire built by one man is parted among strangers.
A mighty king shall rule with great dominion, but his kingdom be broken and divided to the four winds, not to his heirs. Greatness scattered. The empire built by one man is parted among strangers.
The king of the south grows strong; a marriage alliance is made but does not hold. Frail diplomacy. Human treaties cannot bind what God has not joined.
The king of the south grows strong; a marriage alliance is made but does not hold. Frail diplomacy. Human treaties cannot bind what God has not joined.
From the same line one rises who prevails against the north and carries off their gods to Egypt. Shifting fortunes. The tide of war turns as God appoints.
From the same line one rises who prevails against the north and carries off their gods to Egypt. Shifting fortunes. The tide of war turns as God appoints.
From the same line one rises who prevails against the north and carries off their gods to Egypt. Shifting fortunes. The tide of war turns as God appoints.
Wars continue; the king of the south, lifted up in heart, fights and is moved with anger, but does not prosper long. Pride overreaches. Victory puffs up the heart that forgets God.
Wars continue; the king of the south, lifted up in heart, fights and is moved with anger, but does not prosper long. Pride overreaches. Victory puffs up the heart that forgets God.
Wars continue; the king of the south, lifted up in heart, fights and is moved with anger, but does not prosper long. Pride overreaches. Victory puffs up the heart that forgets God.
The king of the north returns with a greater army; the south cannot stand, and the fenced cities fall. Power shifts again. The mightiest defences yield in their appointed hour.
The king of the north returns with a greater army; the south cannot stand, and the fenced cities fall. Power shifts again. The mightiest defences yield in their appointed hour.
The king of the north returns with a greater army; the south cannot stand, and the fenced cities fall. Power shifts again. The mightiest defences yield in their appointed hour.
He does as he will, standing in 'the glorious land,' and gives a daughter in marriage to corrupt by craft. Designs that fail. Schemes against God's land come to nothing.
He does as he will, standing in 'the glorious land,' and gives a daughter in marriage to corrupt by craft. Designs that fail. Schemes against God's land come to nothing.
He turns to the isles and takes many, but his reproach is turned back on him; 'he shall stumble and fall.' The conqueror conquered. Pride's career ends in a fall.
He turns to the isles and takes many, but his reproach is turned back on him; 'he shall stumble and fall.' The conqueror conquered. Pride's career ends in a fall.
A taxer rises briefly, then a 'vile person' who seizes the kingdom 'by flatteries.' Deceit enthroned. Wickedness can climb to power through cunning and lies.
A taxer rises briefly, then a 'vile person' who seizes the kingdom 'by flatteries.' Deceit enthroned. Wickedness can climb to power through cunning and lies.
He works deceitfully, grows strong with a small people, and scatters spoil among them. Treachery rewarded. The crafty thrive for a season by guile and bribery.
He works deceitfully, grows strong with a small people, and scatters spoil among them. Treachery rewarded. The crafty thrive for a season by guile and bribery.
He works deceitfully, grows strong with a small people, and scatters spoil among them. Treachery rewarded. The crafty thrive for a season by guile and bribery.
He stirs against the south; the two kings sit at one table speaking lies, but it shall not prosper. Hollow diplomacy. Plans built on deceit cannot stand before God.
He stirs against the south; the two kings sit at one table speaking lies, but it shall not prosper. Hollow diplomacy. Plans built on deceit cannot stand before God.
He stirs against the south; the two kings sit at one table speaking lies, but it shall not prosper. Hollow diplomacy. Plans built on deceit cannot stand before God.

Returning rich, his heart is set against 'the holy covenant'; ships from the west turn him back, grieved, to vent his rage on the covenant. Malice toward God's people. The frustrated tyrant strikes at the faithful.

Returning rich, his heart is set against 'the holy covenant'; ships from the west turn him back, grieved, to vent his rage on the covenant. Malice toward God's people. The frustrated tyrant strikes at the faithful.

Returning rich, his heart is set against 'the holy covenant'; ships from the west turn him back, grieved, to vent his rage on the covenant. Malice toward God's people. The frustrated tyrant strikes at the faithful.

They pollute the sanctuary and set up 'the abomination,' but 'the people that do know their God shall be strong, and do exploits.' Faith stands firm. Those who truly know God are bold in the worst of times.

They pollute the sanctuary and set up 'the abomination,' but 'the people that do know their God shall be strong, and do exploits.' Faith stands firm. Those who truly know God are bold in the worst of times.
The wise instruct many, yet fall by sword and flame, to be tried and purged 'even to the time of the end.' Refining suffering. God uses persecution to purify His people.
The wise instruct many, yet fall by sword and flame, to be tried and purged 'even to the time of the end.' Refining suffering. God uses persecution to purify His people.
The wise instruct many, yet fall by sword and flame, to be tried and purged 'even to the time of the end.' Refining suffering. God uses persecution to purify His people.
The king does his will, exalts himself above every god, and speaks 'marvellous things against the God of gods.' Blasphemous pride. The tyrant's self-worship is the height of impiety.
The king does his will, exalts himself above every god, and speaks 'marvellous things against the God of gods.' Blasphemous pride. The tyrant's self-worship is the height of impiety.
He honours 'the god of forces' and a strange god, dividing the land for gain. Power his idol. He worships only what advances his own might.
He honours 'the god of forces' and a strange god, dividing the land for gain. Power his idol. He worships only what advances his own might.
At the time of the end the south pushes at him, and the north comes 'like a whirlwind' into the glorious land. Furious advance. The storm of war sweeps even God's land.
At the time of the end the south pushes at him, and the north comes 'like a whirlwind' into the glorious land. Furious advance. The storm of war sweeps even God's land.
He stretches his hand over the countries; Egypt shall not escape; he gains its gold and treasures. Wide conquest. The proud seize all within their reach.
He stretches his hand over the countries; Egypt shall not escape; he gains its gold and treasures. Wide conquest. The proud seize all within their reach.
Troubled by tidings, he goes forth in fury, yet 'he shall come to his end, and none shall help him.' The end at last. However mighty, the foe of God falls helpless and alone.
Troubled by tidings, he goes forth in fury, yet 'he shall come to his end, and none shall help him.' The end at last. However mighty, the foe of God falls helpless and alone.
